sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41663" key="e)pi/xreion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπί-χρειον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n41663.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">what is necessary,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ τῆς διατροφῆς ἐ.</foreign> ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Lond.:5:1708:223" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.1708.223</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(vi A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
